flashcards.definition: f(−x) = f(x); symmetric about the y-axis. Cosine is even.
f(−x) = −f(x); symmetric about the origin. Sine and tangent are odd.
The property that a function repeats at regular intervals: f(x + P) = f(x).
2π — the smallest interval after which the function repeats.
π — tangent and cotangent repeat every π radians.
